strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators
Active open-source AI/geo-platform (GISCollective) with real-world adoption by NGOs like Green Map
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud AI platform product ownership or deployment at scale
Lack of demonstrated leadership in cross-functional AI strategy partnerships with product teams
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) in AI-related field as preferred qualification
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong AI engineering experience through direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, and has built and sustained an open-source geo-AI platform (GISCollective) used by real organizations — meeting the core requirement of AI product fluency. However, there is no evidence of cloud AI platform strategy leadership or direct customer advisory experience, and the absence of a Master’s or PhD in AI is a notable gap against preferred qualifications. His extensive full-stack and infrastructure background compensates partially, but strategic AI leadership remains under-documented.
